violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

A paper towel dispenser was observed installed above the rinse sink. A sink used for food preparation or utensil washing, or a service sink may not be provided with the handwashing aids. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Milk, apple juice and orange juice was observed held at 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the dining area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Inspector observed missing ceiling tiles in the dry storage area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per interview with PIC, ceiling tiles are in process of being replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. A new sanitizing solution was mixed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024
